title: Comprehensive action.yml improvements
description:
Implement all requested enhancements:
1. custom-lockfiles input for arbitrary lockfile support
2. Input validation for base-ref and git refs
3. Persistent test suite (test.sh)
4. Monorepo-aware manifest matching (nearest package.json)
5. Verbose mode for debugging
6. Author metadata and action branding

title: Close security gaps in action.yml
description:
Address identified gaps:
1. Fragile grep logic (substring matching instead of exact filename matching)
2. Missing bun.lockb support
3. False positives on bot-generated PRs (Dependabot, Renovate)
4. No lockfile content verification (registry URL validation)
